title: MTG Collection Tracker App for iPhone
description: MTG Collection Tracker App for iPhone. Organize Magic cards, binders, decks, duplicates, and collection value in one place with Spellvault.

hero.title: MTG Collection Tracker App
hero.description: Track cards, binders, decks, duplicates, and value from one organized Magic collection app.

sections.title: The best MTG Collection Tracker App
sections.description: Spellvault keeps your MTG collection searchable, structured, and easy to manage as cards move between decks, binders, and storage.

items.title: Organize cards the way you store them
items.description: Manage binders, decks, folders, and boxes in a way that matches how your collection actually lives in the real world.

items.title: See duplicates and card locations
items.description: Know how many copies you own and where they are, so trading, selling, and deck building become much easier.

items.title: Keep value attached to your collection
items.description: Track card value and total collection value without separating prices from the collection structure behind them.

sections.title: Track your whole MTG collection in one app
sections.description: Use Spellvault to keep inventory, search, pricing, and collection structure together from the first card to the last box.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Helpful answers about using Spellvault as your MTG Collection Tracker App.

items.title: What does an MTG collection tracker do?
items.description: An MTG collection tracker helps you organize cards, structure your collection, search what you own, and follow value from one place.

items.title: Can I track decks, binders, and boxes?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is designed for real collection setups, so you can manage cards across decks, binders, folders, and long term storage.

items.title: Can Spellvault handle large MTG collections?
items.description: Yes. The bigger your collection gets, the more important it becomes to keep everything searchable, structured, and easy to review.

items.title: Does Spellvault help with duplicate MTG cards?
items.description: Yes. Duplicate visibility helps you see what you can trade, sell, move, or keep for decks and future projects.

items.title: Can I keep collection value and inventory together?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault makes it easier to follow value without losing the collection context that gives those numbers meaning.

items.title: Can I search my collection quickly inside Spellvault?
items.description: Yes. Search is part of the collection workflow, which means you can find cards faster by name, set, tag, or location.

items.title: Is Spellvault useful for collectors, sellers, and stores?
items.description: Yes. Anyone managing a real MTG collection can benefit from stronger structure, faster search, and better visibility into duplicates and value.

items.title: Why use Spellvault instead of a spreadsheet for collection tracking?
items.description: A spreadsheet can store rows, but Spellvault keeps scanning, organization, search, duplicates, and collection value connected in one practical workflow.
